title: Bloo Power Fizz Tabs Anti-Limescale Drain Deep Toilet Cleaning Lemon, 8 x 22.5g (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Bloo - A clean and fresh loo with powerful fizzing action and thorough cleanliness due to their self-active power formula.

Clean - Active foam acts against common problems and removes limescale & urine scale, deposits under water, stubborn dirt, bad odours as well as rust and discolouration – even where the brush is difficult to reach.
Design - Effortlessly ensure thorough cleanliness, with no scrubbing required, simply leave in bowl overnight.
Formula - Contains a premium fragrance blend for a fresh lemon scent
Strong - Bloo fizz tabs work with extra strength and deep into the drain. The Tabs remove the most stubborn dirt in the toilet thanks to their acidity – even under water.
description: Ingredients Contains: >30% Anionic Surfactants, 5-15% Non-Ionic Surfactants, Further ingredients: Perfume (Benzyl Salicylate, Coumarin, Limonene)Contains: >30% Anionic Surfactants, 5-15% Non-Ionic Surfactants, Further ingredients: Perfume (Benzyl Salicylate, Coumarin, Limonene) Directions 1. Remove the Bloo Power Fizz Tabs from their packaging. 2. Place one tab in the toilet bowl. 3. Leave it in the bowl overnight. 4. No scrubbing is required.
